{{Infobox location
| name = Huun
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Huun]] is a desert planet.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Huun]] is sparsely populated and serves as a meeting-place for outlaws, exiles, and travelers.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Huun]] has a [[World Spirit]] that emerges from slumber every few decades.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
